overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's urban downtown. The player navigates sunny streets, crosses under a yellow overpass, walks through a covered underpass with steam vents, proceeds along a green bike lane, and ascends a large white staircase monument surrounded by neon advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking along sunny sidewalk approaching a crosswalk with yellow stripes

notable_agents.action: person in colorful jacket standing near the crosswalk entrance

entered.detail: large yellow elevated highway structure spanning the street ahead
tall curved building with green tinted glass and horizontal black stripes
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny city sidewalk with a distinctive yellow overpass structure visible ahead. The player walks forward past a palm tree planter and approaches a crosswalk, with a green cylindrical building dominating the right side of the frame. A pedestrian in colorful clothing stands near the crosswalk entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with directional signage and steam vents

events.description: entering covered underpass from sunny street, lighting shifts to shadow
passing steam vents emitting white vapor on the left side of the underpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow striped crosswalk and entering the covered underpass area with directional signs overhead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street together toward the underpass

entered.detail: concrete and steel tunnel structure with triangular roof trusses
ground-level vents emitting white steam into the underpass
overhead signs indicating WESTBROOK and JAPAN TOWN directions

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the yellow crosswalk and enters a covered underpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadowed mixed lighting. Overhead directional signs point toward Westbrook and Japan Town, while steam vents emit vapor on the left. A group of pedestrians crosses together, and the green cylindrical building recedes into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with dedicated green bike lane and digital billboards

events.description: exiting underpass back into bright sunlight on open city street
turning left to follow the green painted bike path along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street following a green painted bike lane, passing large digital advertisements

entered.detail: large digital billboard with pink neon text reading TENGU on building facade
bright green painted dedicated bicycle path with white dividing lines
green metal barricade railings separating pedestrian path from street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass into bright sunlight, the player turns left onto a street featuring a distinctive green bike lane. A large pink digital billboard displaying TENGU dominates the left side, while metal railings line the right. The street is relatively sparse with pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with white staircase monument and dense neon signage

events.description: approaching large white staircase monument with increasing crowd density and neon advertisements
stopping at crosswalk to wait for approaching vehicle

agents.ego_description: approaching the white staircase monument through a busy pedestrian area with holographic advertisements and food vendors

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking past the camera

entered.detail: large white monumental staircase structure ascending between buildings
tall building covered in animated digital billboards and neon signs
blue and yellow street food vendor cart with umbrella

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a prominent white staircase monument rising between futuristic buildings covered in holographic advertisements. The crowd density increases as pedestrians gather near the crosswalk. A food cart sits on the left, and the green cylindrical building now appears on the left side of the frame. The player stops at the crosswalk to wait for traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: crosswalk at intersection with white stairs ahead

events.description: black sedan drives through the crosswalk from right to left
beginning to ascend the white staircase monument

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for a car to pass, then ascending the white stairs

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving across the crosswalk from right to left

segments.scene_description: The player waits at the crosswalk as a black sedan drives past. After the vehicle clears, the player begins ascending the white staircase monument. The green bike lane and food cart fall behind as the camera focuses on climbing the stairs toward the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunny urban district that transitions from open sidewalks into a shadowed underpass before ascending a monumental staircase. It begins on a bright city sidewalk, moving past a palm tree and a green cylindrical building toward a distinctive yellow overpass. As the camera crosses the street, the scene shifts from brilliant sunlight into the dim, mixed lighting of a covered underpass filled with steam vents and directional signs. The view then opens back into the sun as the camera turns onto a street marked by a green bike lane and a towering pink digital billboard, eventually approaching a crowded intersection with a food cart. Finally, after waiting for a black sedan to pass, the camera leaves the street level behind to ascend a large white staircase monument surrounded by holographic advertisements.
